Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: Turkey hunting in Texas hits differently — especially when it’s your first time behind the gun. In this week’s HuntStand TURKEY POSSE episode, Will Cooper introduces longtime best friends Aubry Gold and Chance Eckert to the world of spring turkey hunting in the Lone Star State. What starts as a casual hunt quickly turns into full-blown addiction as Rio Grande gobblers fire up, decoys get worked, and the Texas cedars come alive.
Video.title: "Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"

Image.alt: "Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"
"Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"
"Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.
Video.title: Wildbound - "New Zealand"

Video.summary: The boys are at the dirty bird in Oklahoma kicking off the second day of bow season. Randy is already tagged out on a dandy of an 8 point we showed you last season in the “Camp Buck episode”. Joe Umphries from Big Tine is in camp and he is trying to close the deal on a buck he had a close call with last season at the Dirty Bird.
Video.title: "Bow Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: The crew makes it to Oklahoma. Unfortunately, the weather is not in their favor, but that doesn't slow them down. The morning breaks light, and the crew hears dozens of gobbles.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Jacob Pentecost and Easton Thompson head to Illinois for the youth hunting season. With hot weather and slow deer movement, the hunt proves to be a challenge. After days of patience and persistence, Jacob finally gets the opportunity to fill his tag!
Video.title: "Slow Start, Big Finish!"

Video.summary: Captain Josh and the fam head out to do some surf fishing to see what’s biting. Then ended the day building professional sand castles and playing goofy golf.
Video.title: "Family Fun"

Video.summary: Join Dan Cabela as he travels across Argentina to see how scientists and hunters are working together. From region-wide bird surveys to the incredible conservation work being done on the critically endangered huemul deer, this beautiful country has no shortage of fascinating stories.
Video.title: "Conservation in La Albiceleste"

Video.summary: Slade and the crew are finally able to catch up with these elk despite some pretty terrible weather conditions. It comes right down to the wire! Don’t miss it.
Video.title: "Montrose Elk Pt. 2"

Video.summary: We join Denny McMahan on this episode at the legendary Thumbtack Ranch in South Texas. Denny was nominated by his wife for Bucks for the Brave program hosted by Trinity Oaks. After dedicating his life to service in the US Army and law enforcement, he now continues the mission by teaching at the police academy. Denny is a true hero in his community - someone who sacrifices his time, his well being, and his life in service to others, never asking for anything in return.
Video.title: "Bucks for the Brave"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor use Lowrance Active Target all day to find fish, first targeting bridge tarpon then finding a variety of species in Florida Bay mullet muds.
Video.title: "Bridge to Mullet Muds"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor chase Tarpon of all sizes around Florida Bay and the Everglades.
Video.title: "Tarpon Bites"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor catch spotted sea trout and jacks on the grass flats and potholes in Florida Bay.
Video.title: "Islamorada Trout Fishing"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head to the iconic Seven Mile Bridge targeting big jack crevasses and permit.
Video.title: "Seven Mile Jacks"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head offshore to the Marathon Hump, taking advantage of the 26-feet hybrid boat's versatility to find some exciting Blackfin and Skipjack Tuna fishing.
Video.title: "The Hybrid Advantage "

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by scientist Nick Haddad, who educates our hosts and the fishing world on the various descending devices used to preserve stressed catch from deeper waters as the three of them get into some fun Red Snapper fishing off the coast of Marathon, Florida in the Keys.
Video.title: "Returning 'Em Right"

Video.summary: Captain Scott Walker heads swordfishing out of Hawks Cay with his friend, retired WWE wrestler Travis Tomko.
Video.title: "Swordfishing with Travis Tomko"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Ariel Medero fish with David Moss from the Nature Conservancy out of Hawks Cay sampling the bottom fishing and deep dropping. In between the action they learn about the Nature Conservancy’s mission to promote sustainable and transparent fishing practices.
Video.title: "Bottom Fishing with David Moss from the Nature Conservancy"

Image.alt: "Bottom Fishing with David Moss from the Nature Conservancy"
"Bottom Fishing with David Moss from the Nature Conservancy"
"Bottom Fishing with David Moss from the Nature Conservancy"

Video.summary: Good friend Mike Stone invites Willi to hunt his family ranch in Oklahoma. Good friend, Tom Petry goes along to film for his school, “Film The Hunt” and hopefully capture Willi shooting a good, Oklahoma buck.
Video.title: "The Stone Ranch"

Video.summary: Michael continues the family tradition of fish stew and gathering, with hopes that Larkin will pass on the same traditions.
Video.title: "Family Recipe"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken head to South Texas in search of trophy-sized trout. Along the way they make a pitstop to gear up and custom-build a Texas wading rod.
Video.title: "Double or Nothin'"

Video.summary: Throughout the years, our friendships have been forged in deer camps across the country, and this week is a continuation of some of those times. This week, we have Dave Peterson and Mike Winkler from Do All Outdoors and Jurassic Rock in camp with us. When all is said and done, we even got to do a little hunting ourselves and create more memories that will last a lifetime
Video.title: "Deer Camp with Friends (part 2)"

Video.summary: Realtree’s Anthony Virga takes us to his home turf in New Jersey and shows us two epic turkey hunts back-to-back!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Jersey Gobblers"

Video.summary: David Blanton and Mike Chamberlin head west for an unforgettable Merriam turkey hunt in the Black Hills of Wyoming and Montana. From breathtaking western landscapes to heart-pounding close encounters, the Merriams put on a show as the team works the birds across big country.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Black Hills Gobblers"

Video.summary: Captain C.A. heads to Brownsville, Texas, to chase trout and redfish with well-known local guide Captain Ernest Cisneros.
Video.title: "On the Border"

Video.summary: Randy and Cody are back on the Raven in Missouri and with opening day of bow season fast approaching they are scrambling to get all the final prep work done and correct any mistakes they might have made along the way.
Video.title: "Brotherly Love"

Video.summary: It’s still opening week of bow season in Oklahoma and the crew has three tags left to fill.
Video.title: "Tagged Out At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Team Realtree embarks on a journey to complete the grand slam in seven days. Will they do it? Follow along as they travel cross-country and try to shoot a Grand Slam in one week. Florida Osceola turkeys are first on the list. Then, onward. Follow along as they tackle this grand challenge.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Team Realtree Goes for Grand Slam Glory | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Team Realtree Goes for Grand Slam Glory | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Team Realtree Goes for Grand Slam Glory | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Team Realtree Goes for Grand Slam Glory | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: With one farm flooded, the crew heads to northern Luisiana to try and punch a tag on a Louisiana Eastern. The boys get eyes on a group of birds and put them to roost. The next morning, they set up in hopes of catching them at fly down.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: A Louisiana Home Farm Bird (First One in 60 Years) | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: A Louisiana Home Farm Bird (First One in 60 Years) | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: A Louisiana Home Farm Bird (First One in 60 Years) | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: A Louisiana Home Farm Bird (First One in 60 Years) | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: The crew moves westward to the Rocky Mountains to finish off their wild turkey grand slam in seven days. This adventure will be one to remember forever, and it finishes off with one of the guys' best turkey hunts ever. You won't want to miss this.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Loud-Mouthed Longbeards in the Rocky Mountains | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Loud-Mouthed Longbeards in the Rocky Mountains | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Loud-Mouthed Longbeards in the Rocky Mountains | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Loud-Mouthed Longbeards in the Rocky Mountains | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Nobody chases the waterfowl migration as hard as Shawn Stahl of Team Winchester. The Michigan native spends over half of his year running the highways and flyways searching for the x. In this episode, we’ll tag along with Shawn and his crew with their Winchester pumps in hand as they hunker down hiding in fields and timber in hopes of locked wings from ducks and geese.
Video.title: "Stahled Out"

Video.summary: AlBirda's the Word. Every fall, the skies over Alberta explode with one of the greatest waterfowl migrations on earth. Millions of ducks and geese pour south across the Canadian prairie, creating a dream scenario for waterfowl hunters. Also, a Shoshone member and contest winner hunts whitetail with a trusted Shoshone guide service.
Video.title: "Alberta’s the Word | Waterfowl and Whitetail"

Video.summary: South Africa offers an incredible insight into the hunter and gatherer history of ancestors. Dan Cabela re-traces the footsteps of humanity's forefathers and explores how modern, private ownership of land has helped re-balance the human relationship with nature.
Video.title: "The hunting heritage of South Africa"

Video.summary: Long time friends Mike and Danny find a hot top water bite.
Video.title: "Horseshoe Beach"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob joins Capt. KC Spaulding on a quest to catch a slam in the Florida Keys.
Video.title: "KC Slam"

Video.summary: Brandon fishes with Robbie Crosnoe On Lake Henderson. These longtime buddies are dialed into the lake like no one else.
Video.title: "One-Two Punch"

Video.summary: Despite adverse conditions, Capt. Jonathan Moss and long time friend, Capt. Adam Whitson, are heading out on the water in search of the Crystal River Inshore Slam.
Video.title: "Weather or Not"

Video.summary: Capt Justin & Meredith’s beautiful Panama City Beach morning is met with a slack tide so a new path to redfish success is found under a popular bridge.
Video.title: "A Bridge Too Red"

Video.summary: If you had a blank check to build the best fishing boat possible, what would you create? Capt. Justin gets his wish, but it doesn’t come quickly or easily.
Video.title: "Dream Boat Build"

Video.summary: In this eye-opening episode, Dan Schmidt explores the fascinating science behind a whitetail deer's vision.
Video.title: S20:E9 "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"

Image.alt: S20:E9 "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"
S20:E9 "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"
S20:E9 "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"

Video.summary: Capt. Blair tries for an upgrade off the coast of Naples.
Video.title: s - "Option to Upgrade"

Video.summary: In this episode Capt. Jason heads to Louisiana to fish and duck hunt with his buddies Capt. Britt Ordes and Ryan Lambert.
Video.title: "Sportsman's Paradise"

Video.summary: Join Rush and his good friend Anthony Solmo for an epic day of fishing in the stunning waters of Key West, Florida! Leaving the Odyssea at the dock, they hop on a bay boat outfitted with a trolling motor for the ultimate inshore adventure. Gliding quietly through the shallows, they target a variety of species—including hard-pulling Tarpon and explosive topwater Jacks—leaving Rush thinking, “A guy could get used to this kind of fishing!”
Video.title: "Bay Day"

Video.summary: SoCal summer is calling, and the Local Knowledge crew is back on Ali’s home turf in San Diego, California. With reports of hot bites and fish moving in, the crew faces a classic Southern California dilemma — chase big yellowtail around the Coronado Islands or head north in search of bluefin tuna. The options are plenty, the challenges are real, and that’s exactly what keeps fishing in SoCal so exciting.
Video.title: "Dog Gone Yellow"

Video.summary: The boys are on the Raven in Missouri trying to plant 50 acres of Big Tine food plots in 5 days before heading out west to kick off the hunting season.
Video.title: "50 Acres In 5 Days"

Video.summary: Welcome to Season 2 of Turkey Ninja presented by WoodHaven! It's opening day of youth season in Alabama and Mike and Jacob are ready to work on some longbeards! Right off the roost turkeys are in sight and put on quite a show for Jacob who is trying to punch a tag on his 39th "Shrutter"!
Video.title: "OPENING DAY 'SHRUTTER"

Video.summary: The National Wild Turkey Federation stands for much more than the wild turkey – it’s also about forging lifelong relationships and enjoying the kind of fellowship you can only find in turkey camp. Josh Dahlke joins NWTF Regional Director Kevin Hurst and friends to celebrate Spring in pursuit of Missouri longbeards.
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Camp with NWTF"

Video.summary: Willi got an invitation on a late season whitetail hunt in Oklahoma. He joins Tom Petry for a rifle hunt on a property he has no history with, but it did have some good deer and lots of wild horses.
Video.title: "Okie Horse Pasture Buck"

Video.summary: David Blanton heads North to hunt turkeys with new friend Evan Putnam. David gets the true Maine experience catching lobster one evening and following up with an amazing turkey hunt.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "David Maine"

Video.summary: In this episode Slade gets very busy in the real estate world. But lucky for him, Caleb Armstrong takes up the slack. Caleb sets out to hunt swamp bucks on the public land of Tensas Parish.
Video.title: "Tensas Parish"

Video.summary: The Amateur Division reaches its climax at the Super Retriever Series Crown Championship. Top teams battle through the final rounds of Retriever Trials, where every point matters. In the end, one standout handler and dog team rises above the rest to be crowned Amateur SRS Crown Champions. At the same time, the excitement continues on the dock as fun-loving canine athletes compete for their own Crown victories in SRS Super Dock.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 2"
